ports.name: TCP - GamePort
ports.description: TCP Game Port (If you want to change the game port please change it in the ServerConfig.toml file first, then delete this entry and create new Port entries in the template with the Host and Container port set to the same as in the ServerConfig.toml)

ports.name: UDP - GamePort
ports.description: UDP Game Port (If you want to change the game port please change it in the ServerConfig.toml file first, then delete this entry and create new Port entries in the template with the Host and Container port set to the same as in the ServerConfig.toml)

ports.name: TCP - WebConsole
ports.description: WebConsole (by default, you can connect to the BeamMP-Server console by opening your browser and go to HOSTIP:9045 - eg: 192.168.1.1:9045 - or click on WebUI on the Docker page within Unraid).
